items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aims to validate the outcome of AI-generated parameters, but there is no concrete evidence provided that demonstrates the actual validation process or results. While the expected result mentions confirming scenario behavior or producing a failure report, the lack of API reads or persisted state checks means we cannot ascertain whether the validation was successfully executed. This leads to an inconclusive status regarding the requirement's satisfaction.
